items.title: Russia-Ukraine war escalates before NATO summit
items.summary: Russia pounds Kyiv ahead of NATO summit, as Ukraine war returns to center stage amid high-stakes diplomacy.

items.title: Crowds hold ‘destroy Israel’ banner at Spain’s Pamplona bull run
items.summary: A giant banner reading ‘Destroy Israel’ was unfurled as thousands gathered for the San Fermin bull run festival.
